name: DFW Drift Detection — Daily Scan
description: Daily scheduled job that triggers the DFW Drift Scan workflow in vRO. Compares CMDB CI records against actual NSX-T tag state to identify tag drift (missing, extra, or mismatched tags), security group membership anomalies, and untagged VMs. Generates a drift report and flags items for remediation.

script.description: Invokes the vRO DFW-DriftScan workflow for each active site
